tasks.title: Research official contracts, origin systems, and judgesystem runtime before opening full-autonomy capabilities
Enable gated remote draft PR creation/update for PRAgent and align workflow execution mode
Enable gated delegated writer binding for CodeGenAgent while keeping scripts/automation as the runtime home

Validate push/PR Actions, permissions, env gates, and failure paths while rolling out autonomy slices
